productDisplayName: Nike Men Football Soccer Black Jacket
description: Composition Reversible jacket from nike – either all black or yellow with black lower body Quilted jacket made of 100% polyester with a front zipper, zipped hand-warmer pockets, zipped internal pocket, two internal pockets with press studs, lightly padded hood, slim slightly stretchy band on the hood opening, cuffs and hem, has Thermore Rinnova thermal insulation and is filled with lightweight 100% recycled high performance PET fibres, and has the nike swoosh and FC Barcelona badge printed in yellow and black on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold seperately Do not use softeners Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach; Do not dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron; do not iron over design This jacket is perfect for any situation - whether you want to blend in with sober black, or be hi-vis in shocking yellow, this reversible jacket will meet your need. The high-tech insulation is lightweight making this a great jacket for warmer climates rather than deepest winter. Throw it on over your jeans and T-shirt to keep out the evening chill, or use it while training in cooler weather. Lots of internal pockets make this a practical choice. Model statistics Product is a size M of height 6', chest 39" shoulders 18"
